title: incorrect data results for "WHERE int_col <> 0"
poc: SELECT count(*) FROM tst WHERE int_col = 0;
SELECT count(*) FROM tst WHERE int_col <> 0;
SELECT count(*) FROM tst WHERE int_col = 1;
key_bug_features: Incorrect results for WHERE clause with not equal operator
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id integer PRIMARY KEY, value integer NOT NULL, description text);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 10, 'First entry');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (2, 0, 'Second entry');
SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
